title: Martha
writer: Henning Bahs, Preben Kaas, Erik Balling
actors: Poul Reichhardt, Poul Bundgaard, Morten Grunwald
plot: S/S Martha is from 1927 and no maintenance's been done since. Forgotten by HQ in CPH, the Danish crew has a good, stressless time. They celebrate a virgin crew member's 17th birthday buying him a woman. Suddenly, Martha's noticed ...
